title: Dora
subTitle: A father and daughter purchase an old run-down vintage car. However, unbeknownst to them, the car is possessed by a dangerous revenge-seeking spirit.

title: Akhanda
subTitle: When the nefarious Varadarajulu plans to attack Murali Krishna, an ardent devotee of Lord Shiva, Akhanda leaves no stone unturned to defeat the evil.

subTitle: Sachi dreams of a tranquil life with his family after serving his time in prison. However, fate has other plans for the ex-convict when he encounters a dangerous drug lord.

subTitle: A despondent man adopts a young boy with hearing and speech impairments, unaware that the child has witnessed his mother's murder.

subTitle: Naganika, daughter of Shivaiyya, a man safeguarding an ancient relic is killed by Kapali while protecting the relic. She is reborn in her next life to avenge her murder.

title: Kavacham
subTitle: Vijay's life turns upside down when he gets involved in the fake kidnapping of a girl, risking the lives of his loved ones.

subTitle: Raja, a lion-hearted don, heads to the village of Pambinthurthu to protect people from a local criminal and illegal liquor merchant, Nadeshan, who terrorises them.

title: Bhajarangi 2
subTitle: An evil drug baron named Araka kidnaps innocent villagers and forces them to produce drugs for him. Fortunately, a forest officer learns of this and decides to put a stop to it.

title: Tuck Jagadish
subTitle: Bhudevipuram has a long history of families warring over ancestral property. However, when its headman's family falls into the same trap, his younger son decides to break the village's age-old legacy.

title: Bimbisara
subTitle: Getting betrayed by his brother, ancient evil king Bimbisara teleports to the modern-day world and traps in the mirror. Desperate to return to his empire, Bimbisara searches for the mirror to break free.

title: Idhu Ennoda Jilla
subTitle: A young man sets out to avenge his father's death but soon realises that violence is not the key to his salvation. His life changes when he meets a young woman, who helps him rediscover himself.

title: The Great Indian Kitchen
subTitle: A newly married woman tries to become an ideal wife and daughter-in-law to her traditional and patriarchy family. Eventually, their growing demands and disrespect cause rifts between them.

title: Zee Thirai
subTitle: Velu, hailing from a family of hunters, devises an illicit scheme to earn substantial income when the government prohibits hunting as a profession.

title: Iru Mugan
subTitle: Love invents a lethal drug and gives it to terrorist outfits, who use it to kill Indian officials in Kuala Lumpur. When RAW officers find a love emblem tattoo on his neck, they start investigating.

title: Rummy
subTitle: College students, Shakthi and Joseph, fall in love with two sisters. When the girls' family learns of their affairs, they are ready to go to any length to save their honour.
